faqs.question: What platforms is Super Mario Wonder available on?
faqs.answer: Super Mario Wonder is exclusively available on Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch OLED models.

faqs.question: Is there multiplayer in Super Mario Wonder?
faqs.answer: Yes! Super Mario Wonder supports local multiplayer for up to 4 players. Each player can choose their favorite character with unique abilities.

faqs.question: How many worlds and levels are in Super Mario Wonder?
faqs.answer: Super Mario Wonder features 7 unique worlds with over 90 levels in total, plus numerous secret areas and challenge rooms to discover.

faqs.question: Are there any pre-order bonuses for Super Mario Wonder?
faqs.answer: Pre-order bonuses vary by retailer but may include exclusive in-game items, physical collectibles, or digital content. Check with your preferred retailer for details.

faqs.question: Will there be DLC for Super Mario Wonder?
faqs.answer: Yes, Nintendo has announced plans for post-launch DLC content, including new worlds, characters, and power-ups. Stay tuned for more information!

faqs.question: How does the Badge system work in Super Mario Wonder?
faqs.answer: The Badge system allows players to equip one special ability at a time. Badges can be earned by completing challenges or finding them hidden throughout levels. Each badge grants a unique ability that can help you navigate levels in different ways.

faqs.question: Is there an online multiplayer mode?
faqs.answer: Super Mario Wonder primarily focuses on local multiplayer, but it does include online leaderboards for speedruns and an asynchronous ghost mode where you can race against recordings of other players.

faqs.question: What are Wonder Flowers and how do they work?
faqs.answer: Wonder Flowers are special items that, when collected, trigger 'Wonder Effects' that dramatically transform the level in unexpected ways. Pipes might come alive, gravity could reverse, or the entire visual style might change. Each Wonder Effect creates new gameplay possibilities and challenges.
